title: timed nested fork block with disable do not work

features.name: nested_fork_with_timed_cross_block_disable
features.description: Code should include nested fork/join blocks where a named block uses a timing delay followed by disable to terminate a sibling named block in the outer fork
features.snippet: fork begin: outer1 #100; disable inner2; fork begin: inner1 #50; disable outer2; join join end begin: outer2 @(posedge clk); join join

features.name: fork_disable_after_timed_delay
features.description: Code should include a fork block where disable is executed after a timing delay, targeting a sibling block
features.snippet: fork begin: block1 #500; disable block2; join begin: block2 @(posedge clk); $display("clk"); join join

features.name: multi_level_nested_fork_with_disable
features.description: Code should include three or more levels of nested fork blocks with disable statements targeting blocks at different nesting depths
features.snippet: fork begin: L1 #10; disable L2; fork begin: L2 #5; disable L3; fork begin: L3; join join join join
